name: Pride of the Weak
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>弱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>意</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>地</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When a Level 2 or lower monster you control destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard, if you have no cards in your hand, draw 2 cards.
eff: When a Level 2 or lower monster you control destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the Graveyard, if you have no cards in your hand, draw 2 cards.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
misc: Requires having no cards in hand
